---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a scoped course-project improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem and Goal

Describe the user problem and the outcome this request should achieve.

## Affected Role

- [ ] Administrator
- [ ] Store employee
- [ ] Consumer
- [ ] Shared platform behavior

## Proposed Scope

Describe the smallest useful change, including relevant backend, frontend, API, or documentation areas.

## Migration Impact

Describe any persistent-data, Flyway, or compatibility impact. State `None` when no migration is expected.

## Validation

List the tests or checks the change should include.

## Screenshots or References

Add a mockup, screenshot, or reference when it helps explain the workflow. Remove any sensitive data first.
